visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with a digitally enlarged head filter stands in a warehouse-style supermarket aisle. Vibrant yellow and blue text overlays the Costco logo. (2) Close-up shots of purple plastic-wrapped bulk toilet paper packs stacked high on pallets. Bright lighting reflects off the plastic. (3) Trays of thinly sliced raw beef with prominent marbling are displayed in a refrigerated case. (4) Blue and yellow boxes of feminine hygiene products are shown in a tightly packed shelving unit. (5) Various packaged snacks including dried squid, egg rolls, and mixed nuts are showcased in their shipping cartons. (6) A white electric floor fan is seen with its protective blue mesh cover. (7) Large containers of laundry pods and boxes of chewing gum are shown from a slightly high angle. (8) Diverse grocery items such as pork jerky, chocolate balls, sandwich biscuits, and wafers appear in succession. (9) Trays of corn chips and large bags of rice crackers are displayed on shelves. (10) Home decor items like stone-textured Moai head planters are shown. (11) Food and drink products including multi-packs of probiotic drinks, frozen fish fillets, red wine bottles, and canned corn are featured. (12) Trays of fruit desserts (panna cotta) with blueberry and mango toppings are visible in refrigerated units. (13) Pantry staples like sesame snacks, vinegar bottles, and pancake boxes are shown. (14) Beverage and breakfast items like oat milk, coffee bags, and noodle boxes appear. (15) Frozen and refrigerated foods like beef soup, Haagen-Dazs ice cream, and cereal boxes are shown. (16) Personal care products including Oral-B toothbrushes, Crest toothpaste, Gillette razors, and sunscreen bottles are displayed at the end.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main narrator, 2 shoppers in the background aisles.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man in a casual t-shirt, seen with a comical distorted big-head filter at the start.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco wholesale warehouse interior featuring tall industrial shelving, pallets of bulk goods, refrigerated display cases, and wide concrete aisles.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-arousal male voice energetically shouts the introduction over an upbeat electronic pop BGM. A subtle digital bubble SFX triggers. (2) The narrator transitions into a rapid-fire listing of products and prices in Mandarin, maintaining a very high speech rate with minimal pausing. (3) Each new product mentioned is accompanied by an energetic vocal punch. (4) The background music remains consistent with a strong 4/4 beat throughout the entire sequence, supporting the fast-paced delivery.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To quickly inform Costco members of currently active weekly discounts and promotional offers, encouraging them to visit the store and follow the social media account for future updates.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Displaying multiple specific brands and their discounted prices within a warehouse environment.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes extreme rapid-fire editing and high-energy narration typical of TikTok/Reels to maximize information density regarding product discounts.
